title: Grammitis narinensis
taxonomy: Grammitis narinensis is classified as a species of fern in the family Polypodiaceae. This family is commonly known as the polypody ferns or spleenworts. The genus Grammitis is a group of small to medium-sized ferns that are native to tropical and subtropical regions. Grammitis narinensis is one of the many species within this genus, which comprises over 400 species of ferns. The classification of Grammitis narinensis is an ongoing process in the field of botany, with new research and discoveries continually refining our understanding of this species and its place within the plant kingdom.
